meta.title: Victor Parra — Frontend-focused Fullstack Developer
meta.description: Computer Engineer and fullstack developer with 8+ years building scalable web products, polished frontend systems, modern backend flows, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.

ui.footer: Designed and built by Victor Parra as a fast, polished, and content-driven professional portfolio.

profile.name: Victor Parra
profile.eyebrow: Computer Engineer · Fullstack Developer · Frontend-focused Builder
profile.headline: I build polished interfaces and scalable fullstack products for remote teams.
profile.heroSummary: Frontend-focused fullstack developer blending product-minded UI, modern backend foundations, and AI-assisted engineering workflows to ship reliable digital products faster.
profile.summary: Computer Engineer with 8+ years of experience in web development and project delivery. I specialize in frontend-leaning fullstack work across React, React Native, Node.js, Django, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Prisma, and Better Auth, combining product thinking, clean UI execution, and pragmatic architecture. I actively use AI coding models, agents, MCP servers, and skill-based workflows with tools such as OpenCode and Codex to accelerate implementation, debugging, documentation, and technical decision-making while maintaining engineering control.

strengths.title: Frontend systems with product polish
strengths.description: Builds responsive, accessible interfaces with React, Angular, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, and component-driven patterns that scale beyond a single screen.

strengths.title: Fullstack architecture
strengths.description: Connects UI delivery with reliable APIs, Prisma-backed data modeling, relational and document databases, Better Auth authentication flows, and deployment-ready backend decisions.

strengths.title: Delivery leadership
strengths.description: Coordinates multidisciplinary remote teams, aligns technical milestones with business goals, and reduces delivery risk through clear KPIs and agile execution.

strengths.title: AI-assisted engineering
strengths.description: Applies AI coding models, agents, MCP, and skill-based workflows with OpenCode, Codex, GitHub Copilot, and Gemini CLI to accelerate delivery without sacrificing review discipline or architectural control.

experience.summary: Developing core SaaS capabilities for multiple user roles with a focus on interface consistency, workflow automation, and scalable data architecture.
bullets: Architected and developed 4+ core SaaS modules serving multiple roles, reducing manual workflow time by an estimated 30%.
Built responsive, high-performance interfaces with Tailwind CSS, improving UI consistency across the platform.

Reduced development iteration time by roughly 40% by integrating OpenCode, Codex, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI, AI agents, MCP, and skill-based workflows into daily coding, debugging, and documentation routines.
Designed PostgreSQL, Supabase, Prisma, and Better Auth backend foundations to support scalable data access, secure authentication, and product growth.

experience.summary: Led full-cycle product delivery across frontend, backend, DevOps, and stakeholder coordination for distributed teams.
bullets: Led 6+ full-cycle web projects using Angular, React.js, Django, and Node.js, improving system scalability by 50% through optimized microservices architecture.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker, reducing deployment errors by 80% and cutting delivery time by 60%.
Managed a team of 5+ developers across 3 countries, achieving a 95% on-time delivery rate while exceeding stakeholder expectations.
Defined KPIs and project milestones that reduced post-launch bug reports by 70% across delivered products.
Partnered with stakeholders to align technical goals with business objectives and maintain product vision consistency.

experience.summary: Built enterprise dashboard features and collaborated closely with UI/UX teams to improve user-facing product quality.
bullets: Built and optimized frontend features for enterprise dashboards using React.js, Redux, Chart.js, and Material UI.
Aligned with UI/UX teams to deliver responsive interfaces, contributing to a 40% increase in user engagement.
Served as interim project manager, organizing sprints and coordinating cross-team deliveries under tight deadlines.

experience.summary: Delivered production websites and applications for clients while standardizing reusable delivery patterns.
bullets: Delivered 20+ client projects using React, Django, Node.js, and WordPress with 100% on-time delivery and 95%+ client satisfaction.
Reduced average project delivery time by 25% through reusable component architecture and standardized deployment workflows.
Designed UI prototypes in Figma and translated them into pixel-aligned web interfaces across devices.
Consulted clients on scalable architecture and deployment strategies, reducing long-term maintenance cost.
